inputs.label: UK Shoe Size
inputs.businessContext: The shoe size measured in the UK system.

businessContext_i18n.en: The shoe size measured in the UK system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birleşik Krallık sisteminde ölçülen ayakkabı numarası.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La pointure mesurée dans le système britannique.
businessContext_i18n.es: La talla de zapato medida en el sistema del Reino Unido.

inputs.label: Gender (0=Men, 1=Women)
inputs.businessContext: Select 0 for men's sizing or 1 for women's sizing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select 0 for men's sizing or 1 for women's sizing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erkek bedenleri için 0'ı, kadın bedenleri için 1'i seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie 0 für Männergrößen oder 1 für Frauengrößen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez 0 pour les tailles hommes ou 1 pour les tailles femmes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione 0 para talla de hombre o 1 para talla de mujer.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر 0 لمقاسات الرجال أو 1 لمقاسات النساء.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Markaya özel varyasyonlar için ince ayar ofseti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage d'ajustement pour les variations spécifiques à la marque.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste fino para variaciones específicas de la marca.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إزاحة ضبط دقيقة للاختلافات الخاصة بالعلامة التجارية.

inputs.label: Rounding Method (0=Floor, 1=Normal, 2=Ceil)
inputs.businessContext: Choose rounding style: floor, nearest integer, or ceiling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Choose rounding style: floor, nearest integer, or ceiling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yuvarlama stili seçin: taban, en yakın tam sayı veya tavan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rundungsstil wählen: abrunden, nächstgelegene ganze Zahl oder aufrunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Choisissez le style d'arrondi : plancher, entier le plus proche ou plafond.
businessContext_i18n.es: Elija el estilo de redondeo: suelo, entero más cercano o techo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر نمط التقريب: لأسفل، أو لأقرب عدد صحيح، أو لأعلى.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
